metaDescription: GLM-4-9B (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2024-06-05 — part of the GLM-4 (open 9B) line. 9B open model (GLM-4-9B / GLM-4-9B-Chat) with tool calling and up to 128…
overview: GLM-4-9B is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM-4 (open 9B) line. Released 2024-06-05. The original small open-weight GLM-4 line — fully open models for local and research use.

What's notable in this version: 9B open model (GLM-4-9B / GLM-4-9B-Chat) with tool calling and up to 128K context (1M-context and GLM-4V-9B variants also released); 26-language support, succeeding the ChatGLM series.
